meaning: n.沿岸航行,沿海贸易,海岸线
examples: You're just coasting—it's time to work hard now.
I'm in the coasting trade, and rarely out of sight of land.
It's not doing you any kind of service to let you continue coasting.
The Orioles rebounded to win in 10 innings on Tuesday night before coasting in the finale.
There is no coasting to conserve fuel in the Sport and Sport Plus modes.
